log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 23/67
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician --- HP: 23/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician --- HP: 23/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
